content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09D named J09D_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2024, and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the record was created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09D_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09D including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

# Table: decision_table

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code

TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code

BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

# Table: net_master

POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code

TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)

# Table: decision_table

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp; CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS WITH base AS (SELECT d.*, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d JOIN (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%' GROUP BY HAUS) hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'), rules AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG_RULED FROM base), eablg_joined AS (SELECT r.HAUS, r.ANLAGE, r.ABLEINH, r.TOUR, r.ME_MA_ID, r.CITY1, r.CITY2, r.HOUSE_NUM1, r.POST_CODE1, r.EQUNR, r.ENTSCHEIDUNG_RULED AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM rules r LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON r.ANLAGE = eg.Installation), masters AS (SELECT ej.*, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS MASTER_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS MASTER_CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS MASTER_CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM eablg_joined ej LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON ej.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON ej.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR), flags AS (SELECT m.*, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AS has_ms_2024, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AS has_ms_2023, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e3 WHERE e3.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e3.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e3."Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AS has_k_2024, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e4 WHERE e4.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e4.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e4."Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AS has_k_2023 FROM masters m) SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN has_ms_2024 AND has_ms_2023 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN has_k_2024 AND has_k_2023 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, COALESCE(MASTER_POST_CODE1, POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(MASTER_CITY1, CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(MASTER_CITY2, CITY2) AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM flags;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS WITH base AS (SELECT d.*, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d JOIN (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%' GROUP BY HAUS) hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'), rules AS (SELECT *, CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') THEN 'EVU' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG_RULED FROM base), eablg_joined AS (SELECT r.HAUS, r.ANLAGE, r.ABLEINH, r.TOUR, r.ME_MA_ID, r.CITY1, r.CITY2, r.HOUSE_NUM1, r.POST_CODE1, r.EQUNR, r.ENTSCHEIDUNG_RULED AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM rules r LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON r.ANLAGE = eg.Installation), masters AS (SELECT ej.*, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS MASTER_POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS MASTER_CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS MASTER_CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL FROM eablg_joined ej LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON ej.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON ej.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR), flags AS (SELECT m.*, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AS has_ms_2024, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AS has_ms_2023, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e3 WHERE e3.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e3.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e3."Record created on",1,4) = '2024') AS has_k_2024, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM eabl e4 WHERE e4.EQUNR = m.EQUNR AND e4.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e4."Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AS has_k_2023 FROM masters m) SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN has_ms_2024 AND has_ms_2023 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN has_k_2024 AND has_k_2023 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, COALESCE(MASTER_POST_CODE1, POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(MASTER_CITY1, CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(MASTER_CITY2, CITY2) AS CITY2, EMAIL FROM flags

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09D_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

args.email: Please find attached the J09D mandatory reading entries.
Please find attached the J09D meter reading entries excluding mandatory reading and direct mail cases.

kwargs.content:
Process J09D completed.

Files created:
- J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv: 1199 rows
- J09D_DIRECT_MAIL.csv: 6661 rows
- J09D.csv: 19773 rows

Actions completed:
- Sent J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv to mandatory.reading@provider.com
- Sent 6661 direct emails via bulk mail service
- Sent J09D.csv to meter.readings@evu.com
- Deleted temporary table J09D_temp
